title: Application To 2026 Project Period Erasmus+ Exchange Programmes For Studies And Internships
content:
Announcements

Details

Application To 2026 Project Period Erasmus+ Exchange Programmes For Studies And Internships

Students who would like to study abroad at the universities we have Erasmus agreements with or carry out internships in Erasmus+ programme member countries within the scope of the 2026 Project Period of Erasmus+ Exchange Programme will be able to submit their applications on

the application portal

between

04.04.2026 – 17.04.2026.

The earliest project start date for the 2026 agreement is

01.06.2026

. Since the funding scheme has not been concluded yet, it is impossible to set a start date for an internship, study or staff mobility until June 1, 2026, Participants will be granted their fund once the grant agreement between the Turkish National Agency and the University is finalized, and the budget transfer is completed.

You may find detailed information and the application requirements

here.

For any questions regarding the application process, you may contact us at

[email protected]

.

Paylaş
